text:
Kenmi (ケンミ, Kenmi) is examinee #362 in the 287th Hunter Exam Hunter × Hunter - Volume 3, Chapter 23 and an examinee in the 288th Hunter Exam. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 15, Chapter 148 

Appearance

Kenmi has a shaven head, protruding ears, and narrow eyes. He wears a short-sleeved tunic with a simple cloth sash, two-arm braces, a pair of pants, and shoes.

Plot

Hunter Exam arc

Kenmi manages to reach the fourth phase of the 287th Hunter Exam, which is a manhunt on Zevil Island. He is eliminated when Amori and Umori take his badge Hunter × Hunter - Volume 4, Chapter 29 , which is ultimately claimed by Hanzo. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 4, Chapter 32 

Greed Island arc

He appears again during the 288th Hunter Exam, only to be KO'ed by Killua. 

Manga Appearances

Battles

Trivia

Anime and Manga Differences

In the 1999 anime adaptation, Tonpa attacks Kenmi for his badge, but Tonpa's efforts are fruitless as his badge was already stolen by Hanzo. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 25 (1999)
